PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PRESIDIO PERFORMING ARTS FOUNDATION, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-09-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-29-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT ON PENDING SETTLEMENT. IF NO APPEARANCES, CONTINUE 6 MONTHS FOR FURTHER PRO- GRESS REPORT; THEN IF NO APPEARANCES, AT 3RD PROGRESS REPORT, DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-27-2007 - JUDGMENT. NO PARTIES PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
